query:
SELECT id, created_at, status, classification, team_member_id 
FROM calls 
WHERE created_at >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00' 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bTLYzeacnuAd6z.root --database nusXfQu5XBTMz3NUCR6brb --execute SELECT id, created_at, status, classification, team_member_id 
FROM calls 
WHERE created_at >= '2026-02-03 06:00:00' 
ORDER BY created_at DESC 
LIMIT 10;
